chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 334 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For orders on MA No.5445/2025 (R/Surety) 13.10.2025 Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Zahid Hussain was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 23.05.2023, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing three original special savings certificates of such amount. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 09.10.2023. Subsequently, the accused has been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the judgment dated 14.01.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
